title: Abrigo K_AI batch manifest (v1)
description: KPD-11a schema artifact. Validates a per-batch manifest accompanying indexed IAgentRequester events. Runtime write-time enforcement is Phase 5 / KPD-11b, which invokes this schema.

run_id.description: Opaque run identifier (ULID / uuid4) for this batch.

rpc_endpoint.description: RPC endpoint the batch was indexed from.

subgraph_endpoint.description: Subgraph GraphQL endpoint the batch was indexed from.

indexer_commit_sha.description: Git commit sha (40 hex) of the indexer codebase.

from_block.description: Inclusive start block of the batch range (INDEX-01 startBlock for the first batch).

to_block.description: Inclusive end block of the batch range.

observed_impl_address.description: Proxy implementation address observed live for this batch (EIP-1967 slot).

fx_cache_sha256.description: sha256 pin of the FX cache artifact.

topic0_map_sha256.description: sha256 pin of the topic0 -> role/ABI map artifact.

impl_history_sha256.description: sha256 pin of the implementation-history artifact.

schema_version_sha256.description: sha256 pin of the event/panel schema artifact the batch conforms to.
